reasoning: The echo_box_idle_v07 sprite itself is a small, compact white-and-green pixel-art robot/box character — reads cute, round, and toy-like, consistent with the fairy-tale target palette. It introduces no out-of-tone elements (no grimdark, no horror, no edgy aggression). However, the backdrop scene it is composited into is already quite dark: deep teal tiles, reddish shadow regions, and stone walls give a dungeon-crawler ambiance that competes with 'bright sunny magical.' The sprite is too small to anchor or lift the overall mood. On its own design merits the sprite passes; in composite context it contributes only modestly to the warm/whimsical target and cannot counteract the scene's pre-existing darkness. Verdict: marginal — sprite design is in-tone, scene integration is not fully sunny/fairy-tale.
